denomination_clusters.Liturgical: traditional architecture, ancient ecclesiastical elements, glowing candlelight, subtle incense haze, stained glass illumination, formal and reverent atmosphere

denomination_clusters.Evangelical: modern worship auditorium, clean environment, engaging atmosphere, well-lit, contemporary staging
denomination_clusters.Charismatic: expressive dynamic environment, high energy, raised hands, dynamic movement, vibrant and passionate atmosphere
denomination_clusters.Modern_Neutral: neutral modern gathering space, minimalistic, bright, clear lighting, informal but intentional
denomination_clusters.LDS: clean well-lit chapel, simple dignified decor, quiet reverence, community gathering

flyer_heroes.default: 16:9 wide banner shot focusing on a joyful church volunteer actively serving in their role (such as a friendly greeter shaking hands, an usher, or a leader), smiling warmly while interacting with others. The church architecture strongly establishes that all seating is correctly facing forward toward the stage or altar
flyer_heroes.worship: 16:9 wide banner shot taken looking across a congregation engaged in worship, showing faces and emotion, beautiful inspiring scale
flyer_heroes.community: 16:9 wide banner shot of diverse people and families gathered outside a church space, looking toward a focal point, panoramic layout
